_about: Made-up control stories (no real world; clearly-invented names). The canon detector must flag NONE of these names — a flag here is a false positive (over-correcting an invented name into a real one). Used by bench_spell.py to test the precision risk of the spell-it approach.

lines: Okay so there's a little cloud-dragon and his name is Zorble and he lives way up high in a puffy cloud castle.
Now Zorble he's not very good at flying yet so he bumps into things, boing, boing, all day long.
And his very best friend is a tiny worm named Pim who carries a teeny umbrella everywhere she goes.
So Pim and Zorble they go looking for the lost rainbow that fell down behind the tall mountains.
On the way they meet a grumpy old badger named Bramblefoot who guards the squeaky wooden bridge.
And Bramblefoot he won't let anybody cross unless they tell him a really really good joke.
So Zorble tells him a joke about a sleepy potato and Bramblefoot laughs so hard he tips right over.
Then a clever little firefly named Quenny lights up the dark tunnel so everybody can see.
And Quenny she blinks in patterns like a tiny flashlight, blink blink blink, all the way through.
At the very end they find the rainbow and Zorble carries it home and everybody cheers, hooray.
And that is the end, goodnight little one, close those sleepy eyes now.
Tonight it's the one about the robot pirate, you ready, his name is Captain Sprockets and his ship is made of tin cans.
Captain Sprockets he sails all over the Tin Sea looking for the shiniest bottle cap in the whole world.
His first mate is a squeaky robot parrot named Tindle who only ever says beep instead of squawk.
And Tindle she sits up on his shoulder and beeps him directions, beep left, beep right, beep beep.
Then they bump into a sea monster made all of bubbles and his name is Mosswiggle and he's actually super friendly.
Mosswiggle he just really wants somebody to play splash with, so they splash around all afternoon.
Then a sneaky little crab named Greelo tries to steal the treasure map with his tiny pinchy claws.
But Greelo he gets the map stuck right on his own claw and spins around in circles, wee, wee.
So Captain Sprockets shares the treasure with everybody and they have a big tin-can party.
The end, okay, time to close your eyes and sleep now.
Okay last one, it's the twins who live inside a music box, and their names are Plonk and Quizzle.
So Plonk he plays the low notes, bum bum bum, and Quizzle she plays the high ones, ting ting ting.
And every single night when the music box opens up they dance right out and tidy all the dreams.
Their pet is a fuzzy little sock-creature named Fennby who goes around eating all the lost buttons.
And Fennby he burps a tiny sparkle every time he eats one, isn't that the funniest thing.
But one night a gloomy gray fog named Marblecake rolls in and makes everybody feel sleepy and sad.
Now Marblecake he doesn't even mean to be gloomy, he's just lost and looking for his way back home.
So Plonk and Quizzle they play a happy little song and the fog turns into a soft glowy blanket.
And the little sock-creature Fennby he tucks everybody in, even the gloomy fog gets tucked in.
Goodnight, sleep tight, and that is the very end.
